name: rtir-search-ticket

outputs.description: Ticket creation date. RTIR.Ticket.Priority Ticket priority (0-100).

outputs.description: Ticket initial priority (0-100). RTIR.Ticket.FinalPriority Ticket final priority (0-100).

outputs.name: RTIR.Ticket.IP
